about.title: Who am I?
about.text: Computer Science student at EPHEC, passionate about software development and robotics. I love building systems that have a real impact — from clean code to embedded electronics.
project.title: My Professional Project
project.text: I aim to become a developer specialised in embedded systems and robotics, at the intersection of software and hardware. My goal is to join an R&D team working on high-impact technological projects.
